description:
merges multiple selected aims into one. 
combines all connections. 
Useful e.g. when having duplicate aims or when reducing complexity (one more encompassing aim instead of too detailed ones).

status.comment: UI multi-select + merge action in progress (list/columns view)

reflection:
Implemented core of multi-select and merge for list view (addresses 'Select multiple aims (list view)' + this aim + parent 'multiple aim actions').

Changes:
- Added multiSelectedAimIds (array) + toggleMultiSelect / clearMultiSelect / mergeSelectedInto(targetId) in list-store.ts
- mergeSelectedInto calls trpc.aim.merge.mutate sequentially for other selected into target (backend already supports rewire + archive)
- Updated click flow: Aim.vue now emits modifiers (ctrl/meta/shift); Column + RootAimsColumn handle modifier clicks by toggling multi + updating primary nav selection
- Visuals: .multi-selected styling (bg tint + dashed outline), ● badge in title
- Context menu: dynamically adds 'Merge N other selected into this' (when this aim is in multi) and 'Clear multi-select (N)'

Scope so far: list/columns view (DOM). Graph/WebGL multi-select is separate child aim.

Next: polish (range shift-select, clear on certain actions, graph view, tests), then mark related child aims done too.
